description:
The traditional annual concert of the Vocal-Instrumental Ensemble Biljana will take place in front of the Church of the Holy Mother of God Perivlepta in Ohrid, on September 5th, 2025 (Friday) at 8:00 PM.

This year, for the thirteenth time, we will come together to enjoy the timeless sounds of the old-town song. Our special guests for this edition are Emilija Koloska and Stefan Petreski.
locationName: Church of the Holy Mother of God Perivlepta

description:
🍺✨ EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE FIRST TIME IN OHRID! ✨🍺
This September kicks off with the unforgettable authentic energy of Paulaner Fest!

From September 5th to 7th, on the lawn by Palas, Ohrid will come alive with the rhythm of the finest beer, food, and music.

👉 What to expect:
🍻 Traditional Oktoberfest Paulaner Beer – 6% alcohol
🥨 Authentic gourmet specialties
🎵 Live music

🎉 Oktoberfest with a unique Ohrid vibe!

description: Join us for an unforgettable Latino Party! Dance the night away to the hottest Latin beats, sip on tropical cocktails, and feel the vibrant energy of Cuba Libre. Every night brings the passion and rhythm of Latin America to the shores of Lake Ohrid.

eventName: Rakometot e tuka - Dali si podgotven?
DJ Toshevv - Warm Up: DJ Bappe
Koncert na klasichna muzika (Stefani Dudikj & Damjan Mileski)
description: Experience an evening of sublime classical music within the ancient walls of Hagia Sophia. Stefani Dudikj and Damjan Mileski will perform timeless classical pieces, their melodies resonating through the historic stone arches and creating an intimate atmosphere where Byzantine heritage meets musical artistry. The church's exceptional acoustics will enhance every note, making this a truly memorable musical journey.

description: Gather around tables overlooking the shimmering lights of Ohrid and Lake's peaceful expanse as the soulful melodies of Ohridski Calgii fill the air. This traditional music, passed down through generations, weaves stories of our heritage into every note. Enjoy delicious food, breathtaking views, and the authentic sound that makes Ohrid truly special.

Experience an afternoon filled with authentic Macedonian melodies performed by Grupa Lihnidos. Set in the warm, rustic ambiance of traditional village life, this performance brings together generations through music that celebrates our cultural heritage. Enjoy homemade specialties and the scenic rural surroundings while listening to beloved folk songs.

The stage lights dim, conversations hush, and Premiera Bend takes the spotlight at Restaurant Ana Marija. Their vibrant sound fills the terrace as Lake Ohrid glimmers below, city lights dancing on the water. Between songs, laughter mingles with the clink of glasses, plates of delicious food arriving at candlelit tables. The perfect soundtrack to a winter evening in Ohrid.
